inputs.label: Progesterone (ng/mL)
inputs.businessContext: Measured progesterone concentration in nanograms per milliliter.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured progesterone concentration in nanograms per milliliter.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mililitre başına nanogram cinsinden ölçülen progesteron konsantrasyonu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene Progesteronkonzentration in Nanogramm pro Milliliter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration de progestérone mesurée en nanogrammes par millilitre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración de progesterona medida en nanogramos por mililitro.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse moléculaire de la progestérone (par défaut 314,46 g/mol).
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso molecular de la progesterona (por defecto 314.46 g/mol).

inputs.label: Dilution Factor
inputs.businessContext: Dilution factor applied to the sample (1 if undiluted).

businessContext_i18n.en: Dilution factor applied to the sample (1 if undiluted).
businessContext_i18n.de: Auf die Probe angewendeter Verdünnungsfaktor (1 wenn unverdünnt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de dilution appliqué à l'échantillon (1 si non dilué).
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de dilución aplicado a la muestra (1 si no está diluida).

inputs.label: Sample Volume (mL)
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the sample in milliliters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of the sample in milliliters.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen de la muestra en mililitros.
